guest_demo_desc: Upload a PDF or image of an invoice, purchase order, or goods receipt. The system will use OCR to automatically extract key fields. Here is the recognition flow:
guest_info_desc: This system supports Traditional Chinese and English interfaces. You can switch languages at any time. System details:
guest_overview_desc: This system integrates OCR technology with automated reconciliation workflows, helping enterprises digitize paper invoices, purchase orders, and goods receipts — significantly reducing manual processing time and errors. Core features include:
overview_feat1: Multi-document OCR recognition (invoices, purchase orders, goods receipts)
overview_feat2: Three-way matching (purchase order, invoice, goods receipt) for automated reconciliation
overview_feat4: Real-time tracking of approval progress and history
password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
welcome: Welcome to Invoice Reconciliation Management System
account_not_registered: This account is not registered. Please contact the administrator.
account_not_activated: This account has not been activated yet. Please wait for admin approval.
